creator: njm@njm.me.uk
text:
I have been running with your update for a week now and have discovered
no regressions.  I have tried the GUI a few times and that seems okay.  I
use the CLI regularly to collect fan speed and temperature data for display
on my desktop using sysutils/conky.  I also use the CLI to control the GPU
performance depending on what applications I am running.  All work fine.

I have one comment on your patch: you should have removed the setting of
PORTREVISION since DISTVERSION (PORTVERSION) has been changed.  See the
Porters Handbook section 5.2.3.1.

If you update your patch with this one change we can start badgering
committers to get it in the repro.
